title: veronica ochracea
intro: Veronica ochracea, also known as the Orange Veronica, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. Native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Veronica ochracea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
